claim_boundary: Goal1506 records opt-in host-side stage timing for the experimental Python OptiX COLLECT_K_BOUNDED device-pointer bridge only. It does not authorize public speedup wording, true zero-copy wording, whole-app claims, partner tensor handoff, stable primitive promotion, or release action.
timing_scope: Python wrapper call around native OptiX/CUDA device-pointer execution, plus opt-in native host-side stage timing emitted by the same native call.
